'''"Millie"''' was the name given to a [[MILL-247-EE industrial droid|MILL-247-EE]] emergency service [[Droid/Legends|droid]] on [[Tem Chesko]]'s [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. She had a [[Gender/Legends|female]] personality, and was built to resemble a green-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] female. She had blue sensors.

==Biography==
While on a run to deliver [[syntonium crystal]]s from [[Cirus II]] to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] collided with Chesko's [[Starship/Legends|ship]], causing significant damage to the ships systems, notably the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. Without a hyperdrive the journey, which would take around two weeks with a functional drive, would take 71 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] to complete

Approximately 8 years into the voyage, the human discovered Millie in a emergency storage compartment and activated her. 

Over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Millie developed a close relationship with Tem, the two being stranded on a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] for seventy years together. Despite Millie's synthetic nature, they developed feelings for each other, to the point that Millie once attempted to [[Death|destroy herself]] when she believed he missed his former girlfriend, [[Maia (Tem Chesko)|Maia]], more than he cared for her.

As her companion aged and his health declined, she took care of him. Eventually he handed her a [[Laser knife/Legends|laser knife]] and asked her to end his life. Instead, she sacrificed herself to make a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic replacement]] for his failing [[heart]] from her own internal components.
